pleaseCheckCredentials: Please check your credentials and try again.
willBeAddedToFamily: You will be added to the family group shortly.
familyCodeStorageIssue: There was an issue storing your family code. Please use the family code in the Family tab after login.
phoneNumberHelper: Include country code (e.g., +1234567890 for US, +966501234567 for Saudi Arabia). We'll send you a verification code via SMS
codeSent: Code sent. Enter it below or resend.
invitationCodeHelper: Enter the invitation code sent to you by a family member
onboardingDesc1: Monitor your symptoms, medications, and vitals in one place
onboardingDesc2: Keep your entire family healthy with shared monitoring
onboardingDesc3: Get timely reminders and emergency notifications
app.name: Nuralix
onboarding.subtitle.1: Nuralix gives you a real-time view of your health — from scores to vitals to medications, all in one place.
onboarding.subtitle.2: Log your heart rate, blood pressure, glucose, and symptoms. The more you log, the smarter your Health Score becomes.
onboarding.subtitle.3: Your HealthPulse card shows your live health score and recovery trend. Alerts appear only when something needs your attention.
onboarding.subtitle.4: Nora, your AI health assistant, surfaces personalised suggestions and discoveries. Tap any card to learn more.
noraWelcome: Hello! I'm Nora, your personal health AI assistant. I have access to your health profile, medications, symptoms, and family information. How can I help you today?
noraUnavailable: Nora is temporarily unavailable. Please contact support.
askNora: Ask Nora about your health, medications, symptoms...
manageSymptomsQuestion: How can I manage my symptoms?
confirmDeleteChat: Are you sure you want to delete this chat session?
mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to delete chat sessions
failedToGetResponse: Failed to get response. Please try again.
confirmClearAllHistory: Are you sure you want to delete all chat sessions? This action cannot be undone.
allHistoryCleared: All chat history has been cleared
failedToClearHistory: Failed to clear chat history. Please try again.
languageNote: Language selection affects speech recognition and AI responses
microphonePermissionMessage: Microphone access is needed for voice input. Please grant permission in your device settings.
voiceAgentWelcome: Hello! I'm Nora, your health assistant. I'm listening - feel free to ask me anything about your health, medications, or wellness.
useTextInput: Please use text input to communicate with Nora on this platform.
unableToConnect: Unable to connect to voice service
audioNotAvailable: Audio recording not available on this platform
simulatorNotSupported: Audio recording is not available on Simulator. Please use a physical device for voice features.
apiKeyMissing: OpenAI API key not configured. Set OPENAI_API_KEY or NORA_API_KEY in your EAS environment and rebuild the app.
tipReminder: Remind me to take my aspirin at 9am
familyMoodDeclining: Family mood is affected by negative factors
fallDetectedMessage: A fall has been detected. Emergency notifications have been sent to your family members.
noPermissionToResolveAlert: You don't have permission to resolve this alert
fallDetectionNotAvailableWeb: Fall detection is not available on web. Use a mobile device.
motionPermissionsNotGranted: Motion permissions are not granted. Go to Settings → Motion Permissions to enable.
fallDetectionDisabled: Fall detection is disabled. Enable it in Settings.
fallDetectionEnabledButNotActive: Fall detection is enabled but not active. Check console logs for initialization errors.
fallDetectionInitializing: Fall detection is initializing. Wait a few seconds and check again.
purchaseSuccessMessage: Your subscription has been activated successfully!
purchaseErrorMessage: There was an error processing your purchase. Please try again.
restoreSuccessMessage: Your purchases have been restored successfully.
loadError: Failed to load subscription information. Please try again.
noOfferingsAvailable: No subscription options are currently available.
errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
inviteSomeoneToCareCircle: Invite someone to your care circle
tapToAddFamilyMembers: Tap here to add family members and track their health.
pleaseEnterReminderTimesFormat: Please enter reminder times in correct format (e.g., 8:00)
title: Title
medicationConflictMessage: This medication may conflict with the following allergies: {{allergies}}
severeAllergyWarning: Warning: Some of these allergies are {{severity}}!
areYouSureProceed: Are you sure you want to proceed?
pleaseAllowHealthDataAccess: Please allow access to health data in settings
pleaseSelectAtLeastOneMetric: Please select at least one metric to continue
openPlayStoreToInstall: Would you like to open Play Store to install Health Connect?
confirmDeleteMedicalRecord: Are you sure you want to delete this medical record?
mustBeLoggedInFirst: You must be logged in first
pleaseSelectValidEndDate: Please select a valid end date
reactNativeBridgeNotReady: React Native bridge is not ready. Please try again in a few seconds or rebuild the app.
failedToConnectHealthConnect: Failed to connect to Health Connect.
failedToRequestHealthConnectPermission: Failed to request Health Connect permission.
inviteFromFamilyTab: Invite family members from the Family tab
exportInProgressMessage: An export is already in progress. Please wait for it to complete.
exportSuccessfulMessage: Health metrics exported successfully. Use the share option to save the file.
exportErrorMessage: An error occurred while exporting health metrics
confirmSignOut: Are you sure you want to sign out?
failedToSignOut: Failed to sign out. Please try again.
confirmDeleteAllergy: Are you sure you want to delete this allergy?
pleaseEnterBothValues: Please enter both systolic and diastolic values.
systolicRangeError: Systolic pressure should be between 50 and 250 mmHg.
diastolicRangeError: Diastolic pressure should be between 30 and 150 mmHg.
systolicMustBeGreater: Systolic pressure must be greater than diastolic pressure.
healthKitPermissionMessage: Please grant write permissions for blood pressure in Settings > Privacy & Security > Health > [App Name] > Blood Pressure.
healthKitExportFailed: Failed to export blood pressure to HealthKit. Please try again or check your settings.
savedLocallyMessage: Blood pressure saved to your health records. HealthKit export failed or is not available.
bloodPressureSavedMessage: Blood pressure saved and exported to HealthKit!
bloodPressureSavedLocallyMessage: Blood pressure saved to your health records!
pleaseLogInToSave: Please log in to save blood pressure readings.
failedToSaveBloodPressure: Failed to save blood pressure. Please try again.
normalBloodPressureInfo: Normal blood pressure is typically below 120/80 mmHg. High blood pressure (hypertension) is 130/80 mmHg or higher.
howToMeasureHeartRate: How to measure your heart rate
keepFingerStill: Keep your finger still for {{seconds}} seconds...
ppgSignalQualityTooLow:
Signal quality too low. Please ensure:
• Your finger completely covers the back camera lens and flash
• There are no gaps or light leaks
• Your finger is warm and making good contact
• You hold still during the measurement
ppgFailedToProcess: Failed to process PPG signal. Please try again.
ppgErrorHeartRateOutOfNormalRange: Heart rate out of normal range.
ppgEstimateWarning: Low confidence reading — shown as an estimate. Please retry with your finger fully covering the back camera and flash, and hold still.
instructionFindComfortablePlace: Find a comfortable place to sit
instructionPositionFinger: Position your index finger or thumb over the BACK camera lens and flash
instructionPositionFingerAlt: Position your index finger or thumb over the BACK camera lens and flash - either hand works equally well
instructionCoverCamera: Cover the back camera lens and flash completely - no gaps or light leaks
instructionKeepFingerStill: Keep your finger still and relaxed
instructionHoldStill: Hold still for 60 seconds without moving
instructionScreenBrightness: Your screen brightness will increase automatically to provide light
cameraViewDarkNote: Note: The camera view may appear dark when your finger covers it - this is normal!
realPPGTechnologyDesc: This version uses real camera data to measure your heart rate by detecting blood volume changes in your fingertip. 60-second measurement for accurate results.
why60SecondsDesc:
• Captures 60-90 heartbeats for statistical reliability
• Enables HRV analysis
• Achieves 95-97% authentication accuracy
• 0.2% false acceptance rate (bank-grade security)
tipKeepHandSteady: Keep your hand steady and relaxed
tipDontPressHard: Don't press too hard - gentle contact works best
tipFingerWarm: Make sure your finger is warm (not cold)
tipEitherHand: Either hand works equally well - use whichever is more comfortable
tipPlaceFingerGently: Place your finger gently over the back camera lens and flash - the flash provides the illumination for PPG
onceFingerInPlace: Once your finger is in place, tap the button below to start measurement.
vitalSignsMonitorDescription: Measures heart rate, HRV, and respiratory rate using real camera data (PPG technology)
vitalSignsSaved: Your vital signs have been saved to your health records.
cameraPermissionRequiredMessage: Nuralix needs access to your camera to measure your heart rate using PPG (photoplethysmography) technology. The camera will only be used to detect blood volume changes in your fingertip - no photos or videos will be saved.
cameraPermissionDeniedMessage: Camera access is required to measure your heart rate. Would you like to grant permission now or open Settings?
permissionDeniedMessage: Camera permission is required. Would you like to open Settings to enable it?
notAvailableOnWebMessage: PPG heart rate measurement requires a mobile device with a camera. Please use the iOS or Android app.
cameraNotAvailableMessage: Back camera is not available on this device. Please ensure your device has a rear camera with flash for PPG measurements.
measurementInterrupted: Measurement interrupted because app went to background. Please try again.
fingerNotDetected: Finger not detected during measurement. Please ensure your finger completely covers the back camera lens and flash with no gaps or light leaks.
insufficientFramesCaptured: Insufficient frames captured: {{captured}}/{{target}}. Please try again.
signalContainsInvalidValues: Signal contains too many invalid values. Please try again.
unableToExtractCameraData:
Unable to extract sufficient real camera data.

Success rate: {{rate}}% ({{captured}}/{{attempts}} frames)

This may indicate:
• Camera permission issues
• Camera frame access not working
• Another app is using the camera
• Device camera compatibility issues

Please ensure you're using a development build (not Expo Go) and try again.
insufficientRealCameraData:
Insufficient real camera data captured: {{captured}}/{{target}} frames.

Please ensure:
• Camera permission is granted
• Your finger is properly covering the camera
• Camera is not being used by another app

Please try again.
measurementCompletedButSaveFailed: Measurement completed successfully, but failed to save data to your health records. Please try again or check your internet connection.
unableToExtractCameraDataShort:
Unable to extract camera data. Please ensure:
• Camera permission is granted
• Camera is not being used by another app
• Your finger is properly covering the camera lens
• Try restarting the app if the issue persists
researchBasedTips: Research-Based Tips for Best PPG Signal
tipBreatheCalmly: Breathe calmly and avoid movement for accurate readings
sixtySecondsAccuracy: 60 seconds for accurate measurement • Hold steady
cameraPermissionExplanation: To measure your heart rate, Nuralix needs access to your camera. The camera will only be used to detect blood volume changes in your fingertip - no photos or videos will be saved.
openSettingsManually: Please manually open Settings > Nuralix > Camera and enable camera access.
cameraPermissionRequiredForMeasurement:
Camera permission is required for heart rate measurement.

Please grant camera access to continue.
emergencyNotificationSent: Emergency notification sent to all family members
failedToSendNotification: Failed to send notification. Please try again.
morningCheckinTitle: 🌅 Good Morning! How are you feeling?
morningCheckinBody: Quick check-in: Rate your energy level and note any symptoms. Building healthy habits together!
eveningReflectionBody: How was your day? Log your mood, symptoms, and medication adherence. Building healthy habits together!
streakCelebrationBody: Amazing! You've been consistently tracking your health for {{streak}} days. Keep up the fantastic work!
streakRiskBody: You haven't logged any health data today. Just a quick check-in to maintain your {{streak}}-day streak!
streakRecoveryBody: It's been {{days}} days since your last health log. Your longest streak was {{longest}} days - you can do it!
missedSymptomsBody: It's been {{days}} days since your last symptom log. How are you feeling today? Regular tracking helps you stay on top of your health.
medicationComplianceBody: We noticed your medication compliance is at {{compliance}}%. Everything okay? Tap to update your medication status.
weeklySummaryBody: It's been a week since your last health activity. Time for a quick health summary and goal check-in?
diabetesBloodSugarBody: Regular blood sugar monitoring is key to managing diabetes. Time for your daily check?
hypertensionBPBody: Keeping track of your blood pressure helps manage hypertension. Let's check it today.
respiratoryCheckBody: Monitoring your breathing rate helps manage respiratory conditions. Let's do a quick check.
mentalHealthCheckBody: Taking a moment for your mental well-being is important. How are you feeling today?
weightCheckBody: Regular weight monitoring is important for overall health. Let's check your weight this month.
temperatureCheckBody: Regular temperature monitoring helps catch potential issues early. Time for a quick check?
adherenceEncouragementBody: We noticed your medication compliance is below 60%. Would you like help setting up reminders or organizing your medications?
adherenceMotivationBody: You're at {{compliance}}% medication compliance. Let's work together to improve this!
complexRegimenBody: With multiple medications, organization is key. Would you like help organizing your medication schedule?
familyHealthSummaryBody: {{count}} family member(s) may need attention. Check the Family tab for details.
familyMedicationCoordinationBody: {{count}} family member(s) have medications due soon. Help coordinate their care.
emergencyCoordinationBody: {{count}} family member(s) have triggered emergency alerts. Immediate attention required.
careHandoffBody: Time for care handoff. Update family members on recent health developments.
appointmentCoordinationBody: {{count}} upcoming appointments need coordination. Review and confirm attendance.
pleaseLogInToViewDashboard: Please log in to view your dashboard
clinicIntegrationDesc: Connect clinic portals for visits, medications, and care plans
labIntegrationDesc: Import lab results and reference ranges directly
radiologyIntegrationDesc: Sync imaging reports and radiology PDFs
integrationRequestSubtitle: We'll contact the facility to enable secure data sharing.
integrationSubmittedMessage: We received your request and will follow up with next steps.
integrationNotSignedIn: You must be logged in to request an integration.
appleHealthDescription: Sync data from Apple's Health app
fitbitDescription: Sync data from your Fitbit account
healthDataReadOnly: • Health data is read-only and fully under your control
chooseMetricsToShare: • You choose exactly which metrics to share
dataEncrypted: • Data is encrypted and securely synced
syncHealthDataBetterInsights: Sync your health data to provide better care insights
completeHealthPictureDesc: View all your health metrics in one place for better care coordination
earlyRiskDetectionDesc: Track trends and identify potential health issues early
yourDataYourControlDesc: You choose exactly which metrics to share. Read-only access.
weOnlyReadWhatYouChoose: We only read what you choose
weOnlyReadWhatYouChooseDesc: You have complete control. Select exactly which metrics to share, and we'll only access those.
weNeverSellHealthData: We never sell or share health data
weNeverSellHealthDataDesc: Your health data is yours alone. We never sell it, share it with third parties, or use it for advertising.
changePermissionsAnytimeDesc: Update your selections or disconnect completely at any time through the app or iOS Settings.
readOnlyAccess: • Read-only access - we never write to your health data
dataEncryptedSynced: • Data is encrypted and securely synced
usedForCaregiving: • Used only for caregiving insights and health tracking
appleHealthOnlyIOS: Apple Health is only available on iOS devices.
chooseHealthMetricsToSync: Choose which health metrics to sync from Apple Health
changePermissionsLater: You can change these permissions later in iOS Settings → Privacy & Security → Health
syncFitbitToNuralix: Sync your health data from Fitbit to Nuralix
chooseHealthMetricsToSyncFitbit: Choose which health metrics to sync from Fitbit
aiAssistantWelcome: Hello! I'm your personal health AI assistant. I have access to your health profile, medications, symptoms, and family information. How can I help you today?
aiAssistantApiKeyRequiredMessage:
Please configure your OpenAI API key to use the AI assistant.

You can get an API key from platform.openai.com
openAIQuotaExceededMessage:
Your OpenAI account has exceeded its usage quota.

Options:
1. Add billing to your OpenAI account
2. Switch to GPT-3.5 Turbo (cheaper)
3. Wait for your quota to reset

Visit platform.openai.com to manage billing.
invalidApiKeyMessage: The API key appears to be invalid. Please check and update it.
pleaseEnterValidApiKey: Please enter a valid API key
getApiKeyFromOpenAI: Get your API key from platform.openai.com
aiModelRecommendationHint: GPT-3.5 Turbo is recommended for best cost/performance balance
quotaExceededHelpSteps:
1. Visit platform.openai.com
2. Add payment method ($5 minimum)
3. Or use GPT-3.5 Turbo (cheapest option)
failedToLoadInsights: Failed to load insights. Please try again.
healthInsightsSubtitle: Personalized analysis of your health patterns and recommendations
insightsNoSignificantCorrelations: No significant correlations found in your recent health data.
insightsNoRecommendationsYet: No specific recommendations at this time. Keep tracking your health!
pleaseLogInToTrackMoods: Please log in to track moods
pleaseLogInToTrackAllergies: Please log in to track allergies
pleaseLogInToTrackSymptoms: Please log in to track symptoms
ppgRequiresNativeBuild:
Real camera heart rate measurement requires a native build with react-native-vision-camera.

Expo Go cannot be used for this feature as it requires real-time camera frame processing for accurate PPG readings.
ppgUseNativeBuild: Please use a native app build for real measurements.
usingBackCameraAndFlash: Using back camera and flash for heart rate measurement
